name: Oak dining table
shortNote: Solid oak · seats four to six
description: A warm solid-oak dining table with a few small signs of everyday use. Sturdy, timeless, and easy to disassemble for transport.

name: Reading chair
description: A compact and comfortable reading chair in a soft neutral fabric. Works especially well in a bedroom or quiet corner.

name: Ceramic vase set
description: Three ceramic vases in complementary earthy colours. Lovely together or distributed around the home.

name: Floor lamp
description: A slim floor lamp with a linen shade and warm ambient light. The bulb is included and everything works as it should.

name: Coffee grinder
description: A reliable electric burr grinder with adjustable grind size. Cleaned and ready for its next kitchen.

name: 27-inch monitor
description: A sharp 27-inch QHD monitor, ideal for a home office. Includes the original stand, power cable, and HDMI cable.
